--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Thanks Cecilia!

Is Mr. Epstein in New York these days? We hadn't
heard back from him, and
Dr. Rosenstock just asked me to check in, as he's
usually very responsive,
and the message she sent was regarding a possible
meeting next week.

Many thanks. I hope you have a wonderful weekend!
Best wishes,
Rebecca
